properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can see your heart is yearning Everything is so unclear Is the answer ever coming After all these years?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's not an easy feeling Sometimes it seems unfair But He knows just what He's doing With unanswered prayers So hold on

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's worth the wait Just keep believing God has perfect timing Never early, never late It takes a little patience And it takes a lot of faith But it's worth the wait

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: What if what you're desperate for Isn't what you really need? What if there was something more Than what you dreamed?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We may not always see We may not understand But He knows just what He's doing He's got a bigger plan So hold on

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It's worth the wait Just keep believing God has perfect timing Never early, never late It takes a little patience And it takes a lot of faith But it's worth the wait It's worth the wait

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: In His time, you'll be fine All this waiting now, is by design

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: It's worth the wait Keep believing God has perfect timing Never early, never late It takes a little patience And it takes a lot of faith But it's worth the wait It's worth the wait In His time, you'll be fine All this waiting now, is by design
